kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "E:\\grammer\\Embedded_system\\Testing\\Tests\\browser\\traces\\temp\\c1b0936f-1fa5-4d3c-8065-db6b1a276012"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

test.name: Add 3 Meals To Diary

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://cronometer.com/login/
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=username at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'yomnaaaa2@gmail.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Fills the text 'roIp$4XLqd4s@7Q' in the given field.

test.doc: This test case will add 3 meals to the diary and check if they are added successfully.
